ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk taxonomy, including model risk, algorithmic bias, opacity, adversarial vulnerability, data poisoning, training data integrity failures, systemic AI failure modes, performance risk, robustness risk, safety risk, privacy risk, and regulatory compliance risk.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-003 (AI Governance/Knowledge) scores 0.500 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.500) and is edge_case for the Data Privacy Specialist role. Domain prior: out. Core signal hits: 3. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level Data Privacy Specialist.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include decision rests on NIST AI RMF signal (0.500) for a AI Governance domain KSA with out-of-scope prior. NIST AI RMF inflates scores for governance/risk content systematically.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. NIST AI RMF alignment on AI Governance reflects semantic co-occurrence with governance frameworks, not Data Privacy Specialist work. Consistent treatment requires exclusion. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for Data Privacy Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as Data Privacy Specialist requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a Data Privacy Specialist core competency. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. NIST AI RMF alignment on AI Governance reflects semantic co-occurrence with governance frameworks, not Data Privacy Specialist work. Consistent treatment requires exclusion. Revised to exclude.
